title: Replicate log to peers on write and wait for majority ack
description: HandleCommand Put path now appends entry, broadcasts via replicateLog (SyncCommand to all peers), and blocks until CommitLogsIndex reaches the new entry (majority ack) before applying to local db.

title: Wire AckLength: log replication ack tracking + commit advancement
description: appendEntries stub (server.go) is empty and PeerData.AckLength is unused. Need: SyncRequest carries PrefixLength+Suffix, SyncResponse carries Ack/Term/FollowerAddr, follower applies suffix via appendEntries and replies with its log length, leader records into PeerData.AckLength and advances CommitLogsIndex via majority(). Also fixes the quorum formula bug found in CheckElectionResults (missing +1) by sharing a majority() helper.
acceptance_criteria: go build ./... succeeds; AckLength populated from SyncResponse; CommitLogsIndex advances only when majority() peers ack a given log length; CheckElectionResults and advanceCommitIndex share majority() with correct formula

title: Create Client and Accept Write from the connection through an interactive cli
Within Peer Data maintain a new key to keep track of the stale connections - which will be discarded at the vote share count and other crucial parts
